reasoning: The stock recently dropped ~15% on February 9-10, 2026 due to the completion of the BD Biosciences acquisition and soft FY 2026 guidance, bringing the price down to the 319-333 range. The most recent close on February 27, 2026 (which will serve as the March 1 benchmark) is 319.38, which is the lowest close post-gap. Usually, being at the bottom of a recent range implies built-in resistance to fall much further and high likelihood of a bounce, validating the statistical tool's P=0.60 estimate. However, since weekly stock moves are highly noisy and unpredictable, and recent momentum is downward (4 down days in last 5), I am tempering this estimate. Following the instruction to stay close to 0.5 and shrink probabilities for distant dates toward 0.5 (representing mean reversion / increased uncertainty), I establish 0.54 for closest date (Mar 8) and 0.52 for the more distant date (Mar 31).
